docs.name: Animated Glowing Text
docs.description: Animated SVG drawing trace outline over shimmering text characters.

props.name: text
props.description: The text content to be displayed.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: The font size of the text.

props.name: fontWeight
props.description: The CSS font-weight of the text.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Fill color of the text face.

props.name: outlineColor
props.description: The default color of the text stroke outline.

props.name: colors
props.description: Array of colors forming the animated gradient sweep.

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the stroke-drawing animation for a SINGLE character (in seconds).

props.name: staggerDelay
props.description: Delay between each character starting to draw (in seconds).

props.name: dashArray
props.description: Length of the SVG stroke dash array. Tune this higher for longer paths.

docs.overview: AnimatedGlowingTextOutline draws SVG stroke paths over each character, creating a glowing trace-reveal animation followed by a shimmering gradient sweep. Ideal for dramatic headings or hero callouts.

scenarios.title: Hero heading reveal
scenarios.description: Use a large font size and slow duration to make a memorable first impression above the fold.

scenarios.title: Loading splash screen
scenarios.description: Pair with a fullscreen overlay to reveal an app logo while assets load in the background.

scenarios.title: Section title accent
scenarios.description: Use a smaller font size inline with a dark section background for subtle section headings.
